spec_match.rationale: Full matrix of all four values × 28 emoji across five categories — the comprehensive reference card for the property.

interactive.rationale: Click-to-highlight a value column is the only interaction; rest is static. No live input, no per-row toggling, no value comparison beyond the matrix view.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Card promises a 4-value × 28-emoji matrix with click highlight. Delivered.

edge_cases.rationale: Comprehensive emoji coverage but no demo of skin-tone modifiers, ZWJ sequences, or family emojis where font-variant-emoji interaction can be unexpected.

design_system.rationale: CSS variables, matrix uses design system tokens.

openQuestions.title: Add ZWJ sequence and skin-tone rows
openQuestions.detail: 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 (family), 👍🏿 (skin tone modifier), and 🇺🇳 (flag sequence) all interact non-trivially with font-variant-emoji. Add a sixth category 'composed emoji' to cover them.

openQuestions.title: Filter rows by category
openQuestions.detail: 28 chars is a wall of text. Let the visitor filter to a single category and focus on the comparison. Especially useful on small screens.

summary: Resolved the required ChromeStatus reference; 2 follow-up question(s) remain.
